title: My Next Interview's at the Demon Queen's Palace!
overview: Rarely does a hero apply for a job with the Demon Queen. He has the skills, but he’s the one who defeated her army. Maybe he can clarify matters during his interview?

title: Strive to Ease the Burden on Your Future Self!
overview: Shutina is a model employee, but she’s overworked, overwhelmed and stressed out. If he can stop irritating her for five minutes, Leo can help her delegate and avoid burnout.

title: A Little Bit of Thought Goes A Long Way for Efficiency!
overview: Whose idea was it to put Lily in charge of logistics? Why are her proposals drawn up in crayon!? It’s up to Leo to give her a training and development course on teamwork.

title: The Drinking Party From Hell
overview: There are certain rules one must follow when the boss invites an employee out for food and drinks. Especially when said employee is concealing his true identity.

title: If You Want to Quit, Talk It Out First
overview: There’s nothing wrong with quitting a job if it’s not a good fit. But one must make sure that it’s the best move for them and not something they’ll eventually regret.

title: The Hero Shares His Tale of Burden
overview: Listening is a vital part of communication, and Mernes is perceptive enough to know that Leo is holding something back. So the former hero confides his secret to the assassin.

title: A Good Warrior Isn't Always A Good Boss
overview: Edvard is a good warrior, but that doesn’t mean he’s a good leader. Especially when he thinks his troops aren’t trying hard enough when they fail at tasks he can accomplish.

title: Tokyo, 2060 A.D.
overview: People are more than their jobs. Long ago, an unexpected friendship set Leo on the path he walks to this day.

title: I Want to Quit Heroing
overview: Time is running out for demonkind. Leo may have a solution, but that means revealing his identity to Echidna.

title: I'll Save the World, Even If That Means Destroying It
overview: The only ones who can save the world from the hero are the Demon Queen and her four generals!

title: What Makes a Hero
overview: Leo is a grave threat to the world, and no one understands that better than the former hero himself.

title: I'm Quitting Heroing
overview: In the end, what does it mean to be a hero?
